room.caption: Farreaches - Bubble Tower

stringToShow="This door seems to be unusable for some reason." signSize=1 image_yscale=1.75 visible=0
bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=720 newMapY=96 toRoom=rMain_35 colorChange=1 image_xscale=2 newArrowPosX=8 y+=16

bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=48 newMapY=272 toRoom=rMain_92 colorChange=1
GID_SET(241039, self.id) sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask dirStart=90 changeRate=-1.75 pSpeed=2 spriteChange=3 image_xscale=2

shopType=oShopWindow shopText="Check out this Gravity Displacer thingie. OH, and the Blessed Dagger Mystic or something!" maxInv=5 inv[0]=5 inv[1]=7 inv[2]=38 inv[3]=39 inv[4]=40 sprite_index=sKlonoaStand image_speed=0.15
if global.gameProgress>=4560 {instance_destroy()}

GID_SET(395002, self.id) progCheck=9000000
eFlagCheck=string_char_at(global.extraFlags,3) if eFlagCheck="1" {instance_destroy()} spriteChange=7 image_yscale=6
GID_SET(243531, self.id) bwBack=tileFarreachesA bwLeft=0 bwTop=0 bwWidth=1 bwHeight=1 image_xscale=12 image_yscale=10 visible=0
